fieldguide.entity.garlics_snails.snail.d:
Pesky critters that love munching on growing crops. When they eat, they may drop Slimeballs. They can be bred with Carrots, Beetroot and Bone Meal.

Legends tell of the great Immortal Snail, a snail that found a totem of undying and marched upon man.
fieldguide.entity.garlics_snails.immorta: Never shall you forget your hubris, for never shall you know peace.
